data.content: [implementation_review] Rollback regression: the rollback.rs fix from commit 98f66e2 was lost during subsequent merges. The is_queue_state function (src/rollback.rs:110-112) still uses only starts_with("ready_for_") and does not recognize ready_to_evaluate as a queue state. The workflow_runtime import and the is_queue_state_recognizes_ready_to_evaluate test are both missing from the current HEAD. This means gate knots in evaluating state cannot correctly roll back to ready_to_evaluate. The state_hierarchy.rs rank fix (unique ranks 12/13 for gate states) is intact. Only the rollback.rs portion needs to be re-applied.
